title: As a Meningitis Outbreak Spreads in Kent, UK, Here’s What to Know
summary_full: At least 20 young adults are believed to be infected, and two have died, in an outbreak of meningococcal disease in the county of Kent, in southeast England.
summary_public: At least 20 young adults are believed to be infected, and two have died, in an outbreak of meningococcal disease in the county of Kent, in southeast England.
